design_philosophy: Gamified learning without the visual noise. Apple-like premium aesthetics combined with brutalist high-contrast monochrome. Progression is rewarded through tone, spacing, motion, and glows rather than saturated colors.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Apple-like whitespace to ensure focus. Elements should feel like they are floating in the dark.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto bg-[#000000]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#222222] pb-8 pt-4 px-6 flex justify-between items-center z-50

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-semibold rounded-full py-4 px-8 hover:bg-[#EAEAEA] transition-colors focus:ring-4 focus:ring-white/20
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#222222] text-white font-medium rounded-full py-4 px-8 hover:bg-[#111111] transition-colors
buttons.icon_button: w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-[#111111] text-white hover:bg-[#222222] transition-colors border border-[#222222]

cards.default: bg-[#111111] border border-[#222222] rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm
cards.interactive: bg-[#111111] border border-[#222222] rounded-3xl p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/50 transition-all cursor-pointer group

progress_bar.fill: h-full bg-white rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out

monochrome_gamification_strategy.streak: Represented by a crisp white flame icon. When active, it has a drop-shadow glow of white (rgba(255,255,255,0.4)).
monochrome_gamification_strategy.learning_map: Nodes connected by a dashed #222222 line. Completed nodes are solid white circles with black icons. Current node is a glowing white circle pulsing softly. Locked nodes are #111111 circles with #222222 borders.
monochrome_gamification_strategy.rewards: Instead of confetti, screen flashes a soft white vignette for 200ms, and the badge/icon scales up with a satisfying spring animation.
monochrome_gamification_strategy.feedback: Correct answer: Card border turns solid white, subtle white glow, checkmark icon appears. Incorrect answer: Card shakes horizontally, border turns #333333, slight haptic-style delay.

motion.page_transition: Fade in with a slight upward translation (y: 10 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) using Framer Motion
motion.tap_state: scale: 0.96 with Framer Motion spring physics

image_urls.description: Minimalist white wavy line art on a dark background, perfect for onboarding background or profile header texture. Overlay with gradient-to-t from-black to make text readable.
Abstract monochrome geometric shapes, suitable for certificate backgrounds, premium achievement cards, or the final boss lesson screen.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the #000000, #111111, and #222222 monochrome color palette. Do NOT introduce any other colors, not even standard red or green for gamification.
Ensure all Shadcn components (if used) are fully customized to remove default blue/gray aesthetics and use pure black/white contrast.
Use Framer Motion for all micro-interactions: card presses, streak updates, and route transitions. Motion is critical to make the monochrome theme feel alive without using colors.
For icons, use lucide-react with standard white or #BDBDBD coloring. Keep icon weight consistent (stroke-width: 1.5).
Ensure the layout is completely mobile-first, utilizing a responsive max-width wrapper (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative) so it looks like a native app even on desktop.
Implement the bottom navigation bar clearly with active states indicated by high contrast (white text/icon) vs inactive (#888888). Add a subtle top border to the nav.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind over generic Shadcn wrappers when the custom styling (like heavy rounded-3xl borders) is easier to implement directly.
Use the Outfit font for headings and Geist/Inter for body text.
Always apply the data-testid attributes to your buttons, inputs, and interactive cards as per the rules.
